name: Fresh Corn Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh corn, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine the cornmeal, all-purpose flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the fresh corn, egg, vegetable oil, and buttermilk to the dry ingredients. Stir until well combined.
3. Pour the batter evenly into 8 nonstick muffin cups.
4. Bake at 475°F (245°C) for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Each serving: 1 Muffin; Each serving may be exchanged for: 2 bread; 1 fat.
